messages.content:
[Previous conversation summary]

<analysis>
Let me analyze the conversation to create a comprehensive summary:

## Primary Request and Intent
The user is building an audio editing application called "Audio Studio" in WPF/C#. Key requests:
1. Review the project code
2. Create a functional file explorer in the left panel
3. Optimize audio playback performance
4. Fix waveform visualization (stretch to full track length)
5. Add sharp/waveform bars instead of square polygons
6. Create an "Instruments" window for track editing (like FL Studio)
7. Apply effects button opens the instruments window

## Key Technical Concepts
- WPF (Windows Presentation Foundation) with XAML
- NAudio library for audio processing
- C++ AudioBridge DLL for effects
- MVVM patterns
- Waveform caching and optimization
- Async file loading
- Mixer/Provider architecture with NAudio

## Files Modified/Created
- MainWindow.xaml.cs - Main application logic (~1700 lines)
- MainWindow.xaml - Main UI
- InstrumentsWindow.xaml - NEW (Track editing window)
- InstrumentsWindow.xaml.cs - NEW (Track editing logic)
- AudioStudio.csproj - Project file
- AudioBridge.h/cpp - C++ effects library

## Errors and Fixes
1. Windows Forms conflicts - switched to WPF OpenFolderDialog
2. TreeView event binding issues - used Dispatcher.BeginInvoke
3. File browser not showing files - fixed LoadFolderContents logic
4. Waveform not stretching - fixed peak calculation
5. "Object reference not set" crash - STILL NOT FIXED in Instruments window

## Current Work
The Instruments window crashes with "Object reference not set to an instance of an object" when opened. Multiple attempts to fix null reference issues. The build succeeds but runtime crashes.

## Pending Tasks
1. FIX the Instruments window crash
2. Complete instruments functionality
3. Test effects application
</analysis>

# Conversation Summary

## 1. Primary Request and Intent

The user is developing a WPF audio editing application ("Audio Studio" / "halo Blik") with the following goals:
- Review and enhance existing code structure
- Create a functional file explorer/browser in the left panel
- Optimize audio playback performance (async loading, waveform caching)
- Fix waveform visualization to display correctly across track length
- Create an "Instruments" window for track editing (FL Studio style)
- Implement effects processing (Low Pass, High Pass, Gain, Echo, Reverb)

## 2. Key Technical Concepts

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **WPF/XAML** | UI framework |
| **NAudio** | Audio playback and processing |
| **NAudio.Wave.SampleProviders** | Mixing and buffering |
| **Async/Task** | Non-blocking file loading |
| **C++ AudioBridge** | DLL for audio effects |
| **DispatcherTimer** | Playhead updates (throttled to 30 FPS) |
| **WaveformCache** | Peak caching for performance |

## 3. Files and Code Sections

### Created Files:
**`InstrumentsWindow.xaml`** - Track editing UI
```xml
<Window Title="Instruments" Height="500" Width="550">
    <!-- Volume/Pan sliders -->
    <!-- Low Pass Filter controls -->
    <!-- High Pass Filter controls -->
    <!-- Gain controls -->
    <!-- Echo/Delay controls -->
    <!-- Reverb controls -->
    <!-- Cancel/Apply buttons -->
</Window>
```

**`InstrumentsWindow.xaml.cs`** - Window logic
```csharp
public partial class InstrumentsWindow : Window
{
    public AudioClip? CurrentTrack { get; private set; }
    public float Volume { get; private set; } = 100f;
    public float Pan { get; private set; } = 0f;
    public bool LowPassEnabled { get; private set; }
    public float LowPassCutoff { get; private set; } = 5000f;
    // ... other effect properties
    public bool ChangesApplied { get; private set; }
    
    public void LoadTrack(AudioClip track) { ... }
}
```

### Modified Files:
- **`MainWindow.xaml.cs`** - Added `OpenInstrumentsWindow()` and `ApplyInstrumentsChanges()`
- **`MainWindow.xaml`** - Connected Instruments menu to `ApplyEffects_Click`

## 4. Errors and Fixes

| Error | Attempted Fix | Status |
|-------|---------------|--------|
| Windows Forms naming conflicts | Switched to WPF OpenFolderDialog | ✅ Fixed |
| Tree

Please continue from where we left off.

messages.content:
Ошибка в VolumeChanged - событие вызывается до полной инициализации. Добавляю защиту:
✅ Сборка x64 успешна! Запускаю:
Исправлено! Добавил флаг `_isInitializing` - он блокирует обработчики событий пока окно инициализируется.

Тестируйте Instruments снова!
пока на этом все за сегодня
